name: BelieversFlow v2.2.1
body:
## ✝ BelieversFlow v2.2.1

**Crystal clear readability + Full Bible Reader + Visible Delete/Undo!**

### UI Improvements
- 🔆 **Brighter text** throughout — all text opacities increased 20-40%
- 📝 **Better contrast** — input fields, text areas, and cards have lighter backgrounds
- 📖 **Text shadows** added for improved readability on dark gradients
- 🔤 **Larger fonts** on key elements — verse text, diary content, Bible reader
- 🎯 **More visible placeholders** in inputs

### Features
- 📖 **Full Bible Reader** — All 66 books (OT/NT), chapter nav, offline cache
- 🗑 **Visible Delete buttons** — Red 🗑 on tasks & diary
- ↩️ **Undo support** — 6-second undo on all deletes
- 📓 Diary/Journal with mood picker
- 🤖 AI Faith Assistant (GROQ mixtral-8x7b-32768)
- 📖 Bible Version Selector (KJV, NKJV, NIV, ESV, NASB, NLT, CSB, AMP)
- 📋 Task management with time input & categories
- 🙏 Prayer tracker with streak
- ⚖ Spiritual balance tracker

### Download
[believersguidelite.apk](https://github.com/ecoinboxhub/Christian_task_manager/releases/download/v2.0.0/believersguidelite.apk) (3.6 MB)

### Install
1. Download APK 2. Open on Android 3. Enable unknown sources 4. Install
